creator: papowell@astart.com
text:
security/openconnect-gui uses version 1.4.1, and the port was marked as BROKEN=unfetchable from GIT_HUB.

https://github.com/openconnect/openconnect-gui/releases has version v1.4.1, with an ASSETS button.  If you click on the button you can download openconnect-gui-1.4.1.tar.gz,  and put it in /usr/ports/distfiles as openconnect-openconnect-gui-v1.4.1_GH0.tar.gz.  If you now run 'make makesum' the distfile information is updated.  The updated port on FreeBSD 11.3 now 

I suspect that the PORTREVISION=3 should be updated to 4.
